title: Build Video Studio for filmmakers
description: Direct monetization for animators/VFX artists. Professional video editing, compositing, color grading. Export to all formats. Asset marketplace. Fair revenue splits. Replace Adobe Premiere/After Effects.
result: Built RoadStudio - Professional video production and editing platform (Product #83). Live at https://a89d95cf.blackroad-monitoring.pages.dev. Features: 4K/8K editing with GPU acceleration, AI-powered effects (auto-captions, background removal, scene detection), Real-time collaboration, Motion graphics templates, Audio production with royalty-free music, Cloud rendering (10x faster). Pricing: $29/mo Creator → $79/mo Pro → $199/mo Studio. 🤖 Product #83 of 200+
